g.title: FusedAttentionWSTopDown
g.text: Phase tree with real state groups, loop guards, and key register updates

g.title: legend
g.text: - This graph groups states by purpose.
- Each box names the real state(s) used in RTL.
- Loop boxes explain repetition; they do not draw literal back-edges.

g.title: setup_cfg
g.text: Each one writes registers and then goes to s_resp

g.title: q_fill_wait
g.text: expand each returned xLen word into nRows BF16 lanes

g.title: q_fill_loop
g.text: qFillIdx := nextIdx and repeat Q read
qFillIdx := 0 and proceed to QK tile setup

g.title: qk_tile_loop
g.text: Outer tile loop over KV columns

g.title: qk_fill_k
g.text: reads dK packed words from bFillBaseAddr

g.title: qk_tile_exit
g.text: qkTileBase += nCols and repeat K tile loop

g.title: capture_note
g.text: This same mechanism is used in both QK and PV compute phases.

g.title: softmax_p1_loop
g.text: Pass 1 loop over one score row
update running max and denominator accumulator

g.title: softmax_p2_loop
g.text: Pass 2 loop over one score row

g.title: softmax_p2_store
g.text: This repurposes aTileBuf from Q storage into attention probabilities

g.title: buffer_note
g.text: - aTileBuf starts as packed Q input.
- scoreBuf holds the full post-scaled and masked QK score matrix.
- aTileBuf is later overwritten with softmax probabilities.
- bTileBuf is first K tiles, then V vectors.
- accumTile is reused for both QK and PV MAC accumulation.

g.title: pv_fill_v
g.text: reads kvRows packed words from vBase

g.title: quantize_out
g.text: packedBFloatOut converts accumTile fixed-point values to BF16
packedStoreWordsWire groups BF16 lanes into xLen words

g.title: put_loop
g.text: if more words remain, outIdx := nextOutIdx and repeat
else respData := 0 and go to s_resp
